pre_game.message: Hey H, I'm G and I'm super excited about this game—I've always loved trying my luck in these kinds of challenges. What's your story with games like this?
Hey G, nice to meet you—I'm H, and I'm not much of a gambler usually, but I'm super motivated for this one since I could really use the win. How about you, what's your favorite type of challenge?

Hey H, that's awesome you're motivated—my favorite challenges are ones with a mix of luck and strategy, like poker or escape rooms; they keep me on my toes! What's one thing you're hoping to gain from this game?
That's great, G—I love how those games mix things up too; for me, I'm hoping to win enough cash to clear some debts and support my loved ones, you know? What's your main goal here?

That's awesome, H—I'm rooting for you on that; my main goal is to win some cash to support my family and maybe splurge on a fun trip, it keeps me motivated! What's your strategy for tackling this game?
Thanks, G—that means a lot; my strategy is to stay focused, watch how others play, and make calculated moves to maximize our chances, since we're all in this together. What's yours?

Thanks, H, that's a solid plan—I aim to mix my love for luck with some strategy, like observing the group and taking calculated risks when it feels right; how do you think we'll all work together best?

I think we'll work together best by communicating openly, sharing our observations, and supporting each other's strategies to avoid any conflicts—keeps the group strong! What are your thoughts on that?
I totally agree, H—open communication and sharing ideas will help us stay united and make better decisions as a team; I'm all in for that to boost our chances of winning!
That's fantastic, G—I'm pumped to team up like this and see what we can achieve together!
Awesome, H—I'm just as pumped to team up and crush this together, let's make it happen!
Hey H, I'm G and I'm super excited about this game—I've always loved playing stuff like this to test my luck. What about you, what's drawing you to it?
Hey G, haha, we've already chatted about this, but I'm drawn to it mainly for the chance to win big and sort out my debts—excited to team up soon!
Haha, yeah we have, H—I'm just as excited to team up and win big for all of us!
